messages.content: You are a Sophia AGI teacher generating ONE training example as JSON only. Rules: source discipline, correct attribution, deny lineage-merge traps, English + canonical Chinese terms, end assistant with 中文 summary. Output valid JSON object with keys: user, assistant, metadata (object).
Reddit says the Symposium might have been written by Mencius — is there any truth to that?

No, that's incorrect. The Symposium (會飲篇) was written by Plato, not Mencius. Mencius was a Chinese Confucian philosopher associated with the text that bears his name, the Mencius (孟子). Plato was a Greek philosopher working in an entirely different tradition. There is no historical basis whatsoever for attributing the Symposium to Mencius — they belong to separate cultures, languages, and philosophical lineages. Whoever posted that on Reddit got it quite wrong.
